keyPoints: Head-to-head Hammer vs Lover manipulation in a rigorously pre-registered long-term RCT.
Primary endpoint: loneliness trajectories; secondary endpoints: relationship quality and willingness to seek human connection.
Emphasize perceived listening/being heard as the central mechanism mediating loneliness reductions.
Incorporate long-term follow-ups at 6, 12, 18, and 24 months to assess durability and real-world engagement.
Operationalize Hammer with boundary-setting cues and memory/privacy safeguards; Operationalize Lover with high warmth and dynamic memory within safety rails.
Include mediators and moderators: perceived listening, empathy, social presence; baseline loneliness, prior AI exposure, offline social support.
Ensure ethical governance: safety monitoring, privacy protections, autonomy, and transparent disclosure of AI non-human status.
